CVDigital WellbeingEUDPublicationsTeaching

Teaching

Current Courses

  • 01TXYOV - Web Applications I. The course is offered to students in the 1st year of Master Degree in Computer Engineering of the Politecnico di Torino. It aims at presenting the main techniques for creating distributed web applications. It focuses in particular on the front-end programming: topics include the JavaScript language and the React framework.
    [course homepage] [GitHub]
  • 03FYZ - Tecniche di Programazione. The course is offered to the students in the 3rd year of Management Engineering of the Politecnico di Torino. It aims at improving the programming skills of the students, making them able to face with complex problems through the development of software components.
    [course homepage] [GitHub]

Past Courses

  • 01QZP - Ambient Intelligence. The course was offered to students in the 3rd year of Engineering (among elective courses) of the Politecnico di Torino. The course aimed at describing, from an experimental point of view, the fi eld of Ambient Intelligence (AmI), outlining its multidisciplinary nature as well as its technology and application area.
    [course homepage] [GitHub]
